meaning: n.负责人,首长,校长,主犯,本金adj.主要的,首要的
examples: The principal is a very busy woman.
I sent a copy to the school principal.
The map shows the principal towns and rivers.
The AA corporate has little credit risk, and it, too, should return the full principal.
Principal Hoana Pearson paid tribute to the young photographers and their teacher, Ruth Lemon.
